name: SearXNG Local Search Suite
description: Comprehensive web research toolkit using local SearXNG instance. Provides: searxng_search (web search), searxng_extract (URL content extraction), searxng_crawl (website crawling), searxng_map (URL discovery), and searxng_research (multi-step research). All data stays local — no external API calls.

baseUrl.description: SearXNG instance URL (defaults to SEARXNG_URL env var or http://localhost:8888)

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for search requests. Default: 30

cacheTtlMinutes.description: Cache TTL in minutes. Default: 15 (0 to disable)

windowMs.description: Time window in milliseconds. Default: 60000 (1 minute)

includeMetadata.description: Include metadata (tookMs, baseUrl, etc). Default: true

maxResults.description: Maximum results to return (0 = unlimited). Default: 0

fields.description: Fields to include in results (empty = all). Default: []

headlessBrowser.description: Headless browser configuration for JavaScript rendering

enabled.description: Enable headless browser for JavaScript rendering. Default: false

waitForSelector.description: CSS selector to wait for before extracting (e.g., 'tbody tr', '.content'). Default: 'body'

waitTimeMs.description: Time to wait for JavaScript execution in milliseconds. Default: 3000

baseUrl.label: SearXNG URL
baseUrl.help: URL of your local SearXNG instance

cacheTtlMinutes.label: Cache TTL (minutes)
cacheTtlMinutes.help: How long to cache results. Set 0 to disable.

rateLimit.label: Rate Limiting
rateLimit.help: Configure max requests per time window

responseFormat.label: Response Format
responseFormat.help: Configure which fields to include in responses

headlessBrowser.enabled.label: Enable Headless Browser
headlessBrowser.enabled.help: Toggle JavaScript rendering for dynamic content

headlessBrowser.waitForSelector.label: Wait For Selector
headlessBrowser.waitForSelector.help: CSS selector to wait for before extracting content

headlessBrowser.waitTimeMs.label: Wait Time (ms)
headlessBrowser.waitTimeMs.help: Time to wait for JavaScript execution
